title: pilea riedlei
intro: Pilea riedlei, also known as Pilea microphylla var. riedlei, is a type of plant species in the Urticaceae family, commonly referred to as a type of air plant or a low-growing, spreading shrub. The plant has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Pilea riedlei are numerous, including reducing inflammation, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Pilea riedlei is often prepared into herbal teas or infusions, or used in topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized effectively in various forms of treatment.
